title: Careers - Green & Spiegel
content:
Home > About us > Careers

## Why Join The Green And Spiegel Team?
At Green & Spiegel, we believe that our people are our strength and we go to great lengths to find the best and the brightest to join our Green & Spiegel family.  If you are interested in making a difference in peoples’ lives, then why not join our team of people who are passionate about Canadian and U.S. immigration. Whether you are an experienced Immigration Professional, or just starting out your career in immigration law, we provide you with hands-on training and mentorship to bring you up to speed.
We are a law firm like no other – in addition to setting the gold standard in immigration law – we are a diverse group of hardworking people who truly enjoys making a difference in the lives of our clients through our work every day. Teamwork and collaboration is a big part of our day – it allows us to get the job done for our clients and helps us grow as individuals and as a firm.
If you are someone who is eager to learn, values teamwork and strives for excellence with all that you do, then Green & Spiegel will be a great place for you.  We are always on the lookout for great talent to join the Green & Spiegel Family as we look to continue building our team of fun, smart, talented people from diverse backgrounds.
The team at Green & Spiegel truly embodies the “work hard, play hard” mentality. It’s no secret that people in high spirits tend to produce great work. We understand the challenges that come with a fast-paced work environment – we highly value work/life balance at Green and Spiegel and encourage our employees to do the same.
